title: Chinese Historical Society of America (San Francisco) - Visitor Information & Reviews
content: # Chinese Historical Society of America. 5. Current: Chinese Historical Society of America. ## Chinese Historical Society of America and its collection. The Chinese Historical Society of America (CHSA) is a significant institution located in the Chinatown neighborhood of San Francisco, California. It holds the distinction of being the oldest and largest archive and history center that documents the Chinese American experience in the United States. This makes it a valuable resource for those interested in understanding the rich history and contributions of Chinese Americans. #**9** History & Anthropology in San Francisco   #**4** Ethnology museums in San Francisco   #**4** Person & artist museums in San Francisco   #**44** History & Anthropology in California   #**10** Ethnology museums in California   #**16** Person & artist museums in California   #**62** Ethnology museums in United States   #**162** Person & artist museums in United States. ### Images of Chinese Historical Society of America. The Chinese Historical Society of America in San Francisco offers visitors an informative look into the history and contributions of Chinese Americans.
